info.name: Sentiment Analyzer - All Endpoints Suite
info.description: Comprehensive Postman suite covering all currently implemented API endpoints in the backend.

request.description: Pre-train an agent through synthetic market episodes before live competition. Persists Q-table and policy weights into the agent_learning_states table; calling multiple times is additive. Supported regimes: BULL_TREND, BEAR_TREND, SIDEWAYS, VOLATILE_CRASH, VOLATILE_PUMP. Max: episodes=500, stepsPerEpisode=2000.
Set the learning algorithm for an agent. Values: Q_TABLE (default tabular Q-learning), POLICY_GRADIENT (policy network + experience replay). DQN returns 501 because TensorFlow is not bundled.

response.name: Q_TABLE - 200 OK
DQN - 501 Not Implemented

request.description: Retrieve per-step equity evolution data for each agent in a competition. Returns 202 Accepted with a note if the competition is still RUNNING. Use the equityEvolution array to render equity curves on the frontend.

Retrieve aggregate trade statistics per agent for a completed competition (total trades, final capital, return %, win rate). Derived from finalRankings. For per-order detail use GET /api/marl/broker/orders/:id.

response.name: Example - aggregate trade summary

request.description:
## POST /api/marl/broker/connect/:credential_id

Initiates a broker connection for a given credential. This endpoint is part of the **MARL Broker Real Trading** workflow and establishes a live trading connection using the specified broker credentials.

---

### Request Details

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Method** | `POST` |
| **Base URL** | `{{base_url}}` |
| **Full URL** | `{{base_url}}/api/marl/broker/connect/{{credential_id}}` |
| **Request Body** | None |

---

### Path Variables

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `credential_id` | The unique identifier of the broker credentials to use when establishing the connection. This ID is typically obtained after creating credentials via the broker credentials endpoint. |

---

### Authentication

This request requires an **API Key** passed as a request header. The collection-level auth is configured to inject this automatically, but the header must be present and valid:

```
x-api-key: <your-api-key>
```

> **401 Unauthorized** is returned if the `x-api-key` header is missing or contains an invalid key.

---

### Error Responses

| Status Code | Description |
|-------------|-------------|
| `401 Unauthorized` | The `x-api-key` header is missing or invalid. Ensure a valid API key is set in your environment or collection auth configuration. |
Retire an active agent. Removes it from the active pool so it no longer appears in future breeding or competition selections. Status changes from ACTIVE to RETIRED.

Breed child agents from two or more parent agents using genetic crossover and mutation. crossoverStrategy: UNIFORM or BLENDED. mutationSeverity: LIGHT, MEDIUM, or HEAVY. The first child ID is stored in the agent_id collection variable.

Retrieve a flattened list of all evolutionary generations across all tournaments. Each entry includes fitness metrics, population sizes, survivor/offspring/retired counts, and the top agent. Useful for cross-tournament trend analysis.

Retrieve the genome of the highest-fitness agent ever seen across all evolutionary tournaments. Returns agentId, fitnessScore, tournamentId, generation, foundAt timestamp, and the full genome object. Returns 404 if no evolutionary tournaments have completed yet.

Retrieve the current population of the most recent evolutionary tournament. Each agent entry includes their genome and fitness score from the latest generation summary. Returns 404 if no evolutionary tournaments have run yet.
